name: Mirror Abyss / 镜渊
validation: ES Module parse/import, small-summary local-commit recovery regression, semantic boundary regression, history rebuild derived-checkpoint regression, strict stream-fallback regression, deployment syntax/version and ZIP integrity checks
limitations: Original TypeScript project, package manifest and full source test suite were not present in the uploaded deploy archive.
fixes: preserve exact failed small-summary source keys and input-boundary diagnostics when the local commit stage fails
resume prepared, committing or committed small-summary transactions before dispatching another model request
rebase only history-rebuild recovery metadata when the rest of a pending small-summary transaction still matches exactly
never replay conflicted or cancelled summary transactions over newer chat state
derive small-summary changed rows, affected operations and minimal context anchors in code instead of sending the complete current table snapshot
bind historical small summaries to their fact-package stage snapshots so early summaries cannot observe later state
consume no-event-change fact batches locally without a model call or long-term candidate
preserve rebuilt facts and tables when a derived summary fails and retry only the exact failed source keys
classify and expose small-summary input, truncation, empty, protocol and local-commit failures with non-sensitive boundary counts
resume failed history fact batches from the earliest persisted checkpoint without removing completed batches
resume small summary, large summary and final lorebook synchronization as separate stages
preserve native model error kind, status, connection label and latest invocation timing through pipeline wrappers
keep connection failures non-destructive and expose actionable history rebuild errors in task diagnostics
restrict non-stream fallback to explicit Connection Profile stream contract and unsupported-interface failures
never retry ordinary upstream, HTTP, network, parse, cancellation or stale failures as non-stream requests
exclude the stale unreproducible source map from deployment archives
record model-call queue, transport, first-data, response, parse and persistence timing without prompt or response content
replace per-profile FIFO with a bounded priority scheduler
limit each profile to two requests and derived summaries to one slot while serializing calls from the same chat
move derived summaries out of the critical fact-extraction task tail
aggregate native Connection Profile streams before parsing with one compatibility fallback
disable automatic history rebuild by default
perform local consistency detection only when entering or switching chats
record detected history changes non-destructively without calling the model API
pause table, summary and lorebook derivation until the player starts manual rebuild
add an opt-in automatic history rebuild setting
change edit, delete and swipe handling to detect-and-prompt when automatic rebuild is disabled
keep existing memory intact until manual rebuild connection preflight succeeds
show a dedicated history-change pending status instead of a fake running progress bar
preserve adaptive extraction, model routing, admission, event memory and lorebook consistency behavior
